title: YTPMV: Dr. Octagonapus 2
description:
mp3: http://www.mediafire.com/?d3ywdwejx9w

Yes, my friends, the long awaited sequel to the award-winning Dr. Octagonapus music video has finally arrived!

Now with 100% more sync! Yes, I'll admit that there were some syncing problems on the previous one, but that was something I wouldn't let happen again.

This time around, Dr. Octagonapus plans to get revenge on the guy who stopped his song last time (the sink guy). But he couldn't do it alone! He thus created a tear in the universe to get aid from the other Dr. Octagonapus.

My favorite part about this is the Pikachu part. I just noticed that "Pika pika pikachu" is what the audience cheers in Brawl. Coincidence.

Two Dr. Octagonapi? There's gonna be some serious lazering this time!

I made the background beat myself.
